name: ms-08-ai-agent
description: UCE-Nexus AI Orchestrator Agent — Multi-LLM chatbot with RAG and tool calling

scripts.test: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); let cmd = 'pytest test_main.py -v'; if (fs.existsSync('venv/Scripts/pytest.exe')) { cmd = 'venv\\\\Scripts\\\\pytest test_main.py -v'; } else if (fs.existsSync('venv/bin/pytest')) { cmd = 'venv/bin/pytest test_main.py -v'; } try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, USERNAME: process.env.USERNAME || 'testuser', USER: process.env.USER || 'testuser' } }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
